title: Senior Revenue Manager at Mango Hotels

jsonLd.title: Senior Revenue Manager at Mango Hotels
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Revenue Manager with drive and ambition, Mango Hotels in Dhanbad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Mango Hotels:
Mango Hotels is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in GDS Systems

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mango Hotels!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
